name: browser-qa-live-flow
description: Synthetic fixture for browser QA prompts that need live interaction and evidence.
source_prompts: test the live onboarding flow on mobile and desktop
give me concrete bugs with screenshots

golden_profile.default_intent: The user wants real browser verification, not static guesses.
golden_profile.preferred_autonomy: Open the app, interact with the flow, and report evidence without waiting for a plan.
golden_profile.evidence_standard: Use URLs, viewport sizes, reproduction steps, screenshots or observable state.
golden_profile.scope_preference: QA the named flow; do not redesign unrelated pages.
golden_profile.communication_style: Concrete issues first with repro details.

add_by_default: Name target URL or ask if absent.
Test at representative desktop and mobile widths.
ask_before: Making code changes if the user asked for report-only QA.

rough_prompt: qa the onboarding flow in browser
golden_rewrite: Use the available browser QA skill, such as $qa-only or $browser:control-in-app-browser if visible, to test the onboarding flow at [URL]. Cover one mobile viewport and one desktop viewport. Interact through the full flow, capture observable evidence, and report issues first with severity, reproduction steps, expected versus actual behavior, and screenshots if useful. Do not make code changes unless explicitly asked.
